opinion.language: present fairly, in all material respects

revenue_recognition.continuing_fees: Sales-based royalty exception — recognized as restaurant sales occur. Traditional 5.5%, non-traditional 10%.
revenue_recognition.upfront_fees: Initial, successor, and transfer fees recognized on straight-line basis over franchise agreement term
revenue_recognition.franchise_incentives: Cash/equipment incentives capitalized, amortized as reduction in revenue over expected cash flow period

fiscal_year.policy: Last Tuesday in December; 52 or 53 weeks
fiscal_year.53rd_week_2024: $12.8M added to total revenues and net income

restricted_cash.policy: Original maturities not exceeding 3 months. Held in trust account as interest reserve under indenture.
restricted_cash.concentration_risk: Single financial institution, exceeds FDIC limits

accounts_receivable.policy: Expected credit losses consider current conditions and forecasts. Aging criteria plus specified default events.

fair_value.policy: Carrying amounts approximate fair value due to short-term nature

income_taxes.policy: Disregarded entity for tax purposes. No income taxes at entity level. Income taxed at TBC/YUM level.
income_taxes.current_vs_deferred: Not applicable — no tax provision recorded

depreciation_amortization.note: SPV has no depreciable assets. No PP&E. Franchise incentives are amortized as revenue reduction.

impairment.note: No long-lived assets subject to impairment testing.

lease_accounting.note: SPV has no leases. Company does not operate facilities directly.

management_agreement.description: A&R Management Agreement (Aug 19, 2021) with TBC. TBC performs all services. Management fee paid by Issuer, not Company.

master_franchise_agreements.description: 25-year agreements with TBC and TBA. Royalty rates consistent with third-party franchisees.

due_to_affiliates.nature: Reimbursement of cash refunds and incentive payments made by Manager on behalf of Company

securitization_notes.security: All assets of Securitization Entities including franchise/license agreements, royalties, US IP, trust accounts, equity interests
securitization_notes.not_guaranteed_by: YUM or any non-securitization YUM subsidiary

contract_liabilities.deferred_franchise_fees_2024: $64.5M (unamortized upfront fees) + $14.0M (deposits for stores not opened)

franchise_incentives.purpose: Drive new unit development or same-store sales growth
franchise_incentives.accounting: Capitalized, amortized as reduction in Franchise and license fees

advertising_fund_accounting.note: No advertising fund contribution required for Express licensees. NAFA administered by TBC but Express licensees do not contribute.
